creator: proett@nas.nasa.gov
text:
>    What do you do when the process ID's wrap?
> 
> -DG
> 
> David Greenman
> Core-team/Principal Architect, The FreeBSD Project

In kern/kern_fork.c fork1(), there is code for picking the next
pid.  I followed the same style used for skipping pid's used by
existing processes and process groups.

Tom Proett

-- 
proett@nas.nasa.gov
NASA Ames Research Center
